overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player descends from an elevated walkway through narrow alleys and corridors adorned with holographic advertisements, eventually emerging onto a wider commercial street with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon railings

events.description: begins descending ramp from elevated walkway to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway and descending a concrete ramp into a lower plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large curved building structure with green-tinted windows overhead
cyan neon light strip along the edge of the walkway
tree with distinctive red foliage visible against the building
concrete ramp leading downward to lower level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete walkway beneath a futuristic curved building with green-tinted windows. A cyan neon railing lines the left side as the camera moves forward and begins descending a ramp. A single pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction. The environment transitions from the open elevated area into a descending ramp with graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza with food stalls and red neon staircase

events.description: exits ramp into lower plaza area with red neon staircase visible
approaching bright neon ramen shop signs increases local illumination

agents.ego_description: walking past food stalls and neon signage at the bottom of the ramp

entered.detail: staircase with bright red neon lighting on the steps and edges
traditional-style food stall with illuminated interior
circular neon sign with Japanese characters and ramen graphics

segments.scene_description: Exiting the ramp, the scene opens into a lower plaza featuring a striking red neon staircase on the left. The camera passes by food stalls with traditional canopies and approaches a narrow corridor marked by bright circular neon ramen signs. The lighting shifts from ambient to vibrant neon as the corridor entrance approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with vertical billboards

events.description: enters narrow corridor between tall buildings with large vertical advertisements
encountering multiple pedestrians walking through the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley passing NPCs and large holographic advertisements on the walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking toward the camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti art
stack of cardboard boxes and debris against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed alley flanked by concrete walls covered in graffiti. Large vertical holographic billboards illuminate the right side while pedestrians walk toward the camera through the confined space. The environment feels tight and urban, with trash and cardboard boxes lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with yellow neon accent lighting and storefronts

events.description: turns right into wider alley with continuous yellow neon strip lighting
passing by various storefronts and groups of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along yellow-lit alley passing various shops and pedestrians standing near walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack standing near the wall
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: continuous horizontal yellow neon light strip running along the wall
large advertisement screen displaying Dynalar brand with cybernetic imagery
storefront with red neon signage reading BURRITO
traditional red paper lantern hanging above the walkway

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a wider commercial alley, the scene features a prominent yellow neon strip running along the left wall. The camera passes various storefronts including a burrito shop and encounters scattered pedestrians. Traditional red paper lanterns mix with futuristic advertising, creating a distinct cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service walkway with green lighting and mesh fencing

events.description: enters covered walkway with green fluorescent lighting and metal mesh walls
approaching exit shows transition from green interior to brighter neon exterior

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with mesh fencing on the right side and utility pipes overhead

entered.detail: ceiling with green fluorescent tube lighting creating a sickly green ambiance
metal chain-link or mesh fencing along the right wall
exposed industrial pipes and conduits running along the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered service walkway illuminated by green fluorescent lighting. Metal mesh fencing lines the right wall while exposed utility pipes run along the left. The space feels industrial and confined, serving as a transition between the commercial alley and the open street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial street with massive holographic billboards and mixed traditional-futuristic architecture

events.description: emerges from covered walkway into wide open street with large digital billboards
approaching traditional shrine gate structure amidst futuristic surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking along wide sidewalk with massive holographic billboards overhead and traditional architectural elements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: traditional Japanese torii-style gate structure with wooden roof
massive floating digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
small structure with multiple vending machines and illuminated displays
tall building covered in large digital screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide commercial street dominated by massive holographic billboards and digital towers. A traditional Japanese shrine gate stands in the center, creating a striking contrast between old and new architecture. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalk while vehicles move in the distance, and the camera continues forward through this expansive cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated concrete walkway down into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched depths of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a curved building with green-tinted windows, gliding past a cyan railing before descending a ramp flanked by graffiti-covered walls. As the camera exits the ramp, the environment opens into a lower plaza where the lighting shifts to vibrant reds and yellows, passing by traditional food stalls and circular neon ramen signs. The scene then narrows as the camera enters a confined alleyway, where the open plaza gives way to tight concrete walls and scattered debris. Finally, the perspective pushes through the urban corridor, flanked by towering vertical holographic billboards and pedestrians moving through the dim, neon-lit space.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant commercial alley through a confined industrial corridor and into a sprawling neon cityscape. It begins by turning into a wide alleyway where yellow neon strips and red paper lanterns illuminate storefronts and scattered pedestrians. As the camera moves forward, the open air gives way to a covered service walkway, shifting the atmosphere to a confined industrial space defined by green fluorescent lighting, metal mesh fencing, and exposed utility pipes. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the tunnel onto a wide commercial street dominated by massive holographic billboards and towering digital displays. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal a traditional Japanese shrine gate standing in stark contrast to the surrounding futuristic architecture and distant city traffic.
